query: Our Playwright suite has 40 green happy-path tests, but production still breaks after users move between checkout, account, and order-history screens. Design deep stateful E2E journeys with persistence and failure-boundary assertions.
Design extended mobile E2E scenarios for a project app where users background the app, return later, switch views, and expect server state to remain consistent across the session.
Our Cypress tests cover individual collaboration features. I need multi-user scenarios for invite, concurrent edit, reconnect, and cross-client consistency rather than another flat feature checklist.
The desktop test suite passes, yet long-running sessions fail after workspace switching and offline recovery. Help turn the critical personas into multi-step state-machine scenarios.
We already chose the E2E layer and release risks. Now deepen it with realistic user journeys, re-entry checks, dependency failure edges, and business-state assertions.

We have an approved test strategy. The remaining gap is one 15-step checkout journey across login, cart, payment retry, reload, and order history. Design that stateful E2E scenario and its invariants.
Decide our overall unit, integration, contract, and E2E test pyramid ratios for a new service and tell us what belongs in CI.
One Playwright test intermittently times out on a locator. Diagnose the root cause of that specific flaky failure before changing the test.
Implement a Playwright page object and selectors for the existing single checkout smoke test.
Review this Cypress pull request for correctness and maintainability; the scenario design is already approved.
Write unit tests for calculateDiscount, including negative prices, zero quantity, and expired coupons.
Design the REST API contract for creating and cancelling an order.
Create a load-testing plan for 20,000 requests per second and identify saturation metrics.
Threat-model the OAuth callback and review CSRF, redirect URI, and token leakage risks.
Configure CI to shard our existing Playwright suite across four workers and upload traces on failure.
Add a single smoke test that opens the home page and checks the navigation bar is visible.
Debug why the production API returns HTTP 500 for one customer after yesterday's deploy.
Review this database migration for backward compatibility and lock duration.
Write acceptance criteria for password reset before implementation starts.
Audit the checkout UI for keyboard navigation, focus order, and screen-reader labels.
